title: OpenAI launches GPT-4o with improved multimodal capabilities
summary: OpenAI's new model combines text, vision, and audio understanding.

title: OpenAI raises $40B in new funding round led by SoftBank
summary: The round values OpenAI at $150B post-money.

title: Anthropic announces Claude 3.5 Sonnet with advanced reasoning
summary: The new model outperforms GPT-4 on coding and math benchmarks.

title: Mistral AI releases new open-weight model with 12B parameters
summary: The model is available for commercial use under MIT license.

title: Cursor raises $60M Series A to build AI-powered IDE
summary: The round was led by Andreessen Horowitz and Sequoia Capital.

title: Perplexity launches Pro search with real-time data integration
summary: The new tier includes advanced citation and data analysis tools.

title: Midjourney v7 introduces 3D scene generation
summary: Users can now generate immersive 3D environments from text prompts.

title: Runway raises $200M Series C for AI video generation
summary: The round was co-led by Sequoia and Index Ventures.

title: Synthesia partners with Microsoft for enterprise AI avatars
summary: The partnership will integrate Synthesia's avatars into Microsoft Teams.

title: Glean acquires AI search startup for $200M
summary: The acquisition strengthens Glean's enterprise search capabilities.

title: Hugging Face launches AI model hub with 1M models
summary: The platform now hosts over 1 million AI models.

title: Cohere secures $400M Series C at $2B valuation
summary: The round was led by Sequoia and Tiger Global.

title: xAI raises $500M Series A to compete with OpenAI
summary: Elon Musk's AI startup aims to build safe, truth-seeking AI.

title: Google DeepMind announces breakthrough in protein folding
summary: AlphaFold 3 achieves 99% accuracy in protein structure prediction.

title: Scale AI acquires data labeling startup for $150M
summary: The acquisition expands Scale's capabilities in video and audio labeling.

title: Weights & Biases launches new LLM observability tool
summary: The tool provides real-time monitoring for production LLM deployments.

title: Dataiku adds AI governance features to enterprise platform
summary: New features include bias detection and compliance reporting.

title: H2O.ai raises $100M Series C for AI democratization
summary: The round was led by Sequoia and Bain Capital Ventures.

title: SambaNova Systems launches new AI training chip
summary: The SN40 chip claims 2x performance improvement over previous generation.

title: Cerebras and Groq partner to build AI supercomputer
summary: The partnership aims to build the world's fastest AI training cluster.

title: Stability AI releases Stable Video Diffusion model
summary: The model generates high-quality videos from text prompts.

title: Deepgram raises $100M Series B for speech AI
summary: The round was led by Tiger Global and Sequoia.

title: AssemblyAI launches real-time transcription API
summary: The new API supports streaming audio transcription with low latency.

title: Descript raises $100M Series C for AI video editing
summary: The round values Descript at $1.2B post-money.

title: NVIDIA announces new AI chip for data centers
summary: The Blackwell B200 chip delivers 2.5x AI training performance.

title: Databricks acquires AI startup for $500M
summary: The acquisition adds AI orchestration capabilities to Databricks.

title: Character.ai introduces premium tier with faster responses
summary: Users can now get priority access with lower latency.

title: Airtable launches AI-powered automations for no-code apps
summary: The new features enable users to build AI agents without coding.

title: Notion integrates AI writing assistant for all users
summary: The AI assistant helps with content generation and summarization.

title: Adept AI launches enterprise workflow automation platform
summary: The platform automates complex business processes with AI agents.

title: Pika raises $55M Series A to advance AI video generation
summary: The round was led by Sequoia and Index Ventures.
